name: @moolam/learning
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. Learning substrate contracts: turn-trajectory schema (B9 metadata + C0 training fields), parse boundary for corpus/gym/critic pipelines.

scripts.test: pnpm run build && node --test tests/trajectory_schema.test.mjs tests/trajectory_schema_export.test.mjs tests/trajectory_roundtrip.test.mjs tests/outcome_signal.test.mjs tests/critics_interface.test.mjs tests/critics_pack_oracles.test.mjs tests/critics_lineage.test.mjs tests/critics_core_rubric.test.mjs tests/critics_core_rubric_goldens.test.mjs tests/trajectory_queue_redis.test.mjs tests/staleness_control.test.mjs tests/policy_handshake.test.mjs tests/grpo_group.test.mjs tests/grpo_advantage.test.mjs tests/checkpoint_lineage.test.mjs --experimental-strip-types --test tests/routing_tuner.test.mjs tests/routing_tuner_shadow.test.mjs ../../training/eval/drift/drift_monitor.test.ts ../../training/eval/drift/drift_injection.test.ts
